'''dhahofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olachen|olachen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olachen|olachen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhahofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhefeth|dhæhefeth]] || [[word:dhæhefej|dhæhefej]] || [[word:dhæhefesh|dhæhefesh]] || [[word:dhæhefe|dhæhefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahohofoth|dhahohofoth]] || [[word:dhahohofoj|dhahohofoj]] || [[word:dhahohofosh|dhahohofosh]] || [[word:dhahohofo|dhahohofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahofoth|dhahofoth]] || [[word:dhahofoj|dhahofoj]] || [[word:dhahofosh|dhahofosh]] || [[word:dhahofo|dhahofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahoffoth|dhahoffoth]] || [[word:dhahoffoj|dhahoffoj]] || [[word:dhahoffosh|dhahoffosh]] || [[word:dhahoffof|dhahoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahofotho|dhahofotho]] || [[word:dhahofojo|dhahofojo]] || [[word:dhahofosho|dhahofosho]] || [[word:dhahofoko|dhahofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahofoth|dhahofoth]] || [[word:dhahofoj|dhahofoj]] || [[word:dhahofosh|dhahofosh]] || [[word:dhahofo|dhahofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahofothol|dhahofothol]] || [[word:dhahofojol|dhahofojol]] || [[word:dhahofoshol|dhahofoshol]] || [[word:dhahofokol|dhahofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahofothotho|dhahofothotho]] || [[word:dhahofojojo|dhahofojojo]] || [[word:dhahofoshosho|dhahofoshosho]] || [[word:dhahofoko|dhahofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahofothon|dhahofothon]] || [[word:dhahofojon|dhahofojon]] || [[word:dhahofoshon|dhahofoshon]] || [[word:dhahofokon|dhahofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahofothoro|dhahofothoro]] || [[word:dhahofojoro|dhahofojoro]] || [[word:dhahofoshoro|dhahofoshoro]] || [[word:dhahofokoro|dhahofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
